protocols.Paper_title: Lytic Myophage Abp53 Encodes Several Proteins Similar to Those Encoded by Host Acinetobacter baumannii and Phage phiKO2
protocols.Evidence: Hospital samples were centrifuged and filtered; supernatants were checked for phages by spot test.

protocols.Paper_title: Lytic Myophage Abp53 Encodes Several Proteins Similar to Those Encoded by Host Acinetobacter baumannii and Phage phiKO2
protocols.Evidence: High-titer lysates were centrifuged, filtered, ultracentrifuged, and dialyzed to recover phage particles.

protocols.Paper_title: Lytic Myophage Abp53 Encodes Several Proteins Similar to Those Encoded by Host Acinetobacter baumannii and Phage phiKO2
protocols.Evidence: Purified phage particles were boiled in loading buffer and separated by SDS-PAGE.

protocols.Paper_title: Lytic Myophage Abp53 Encodes Several Proteins Similar to Those Encoded by Host Acinetobacter baumannii and Phage phiKO2
protocols.Evidence: Phage particles purified by ultracentrifugation were treated with SDS and proteinase K above 40°C; DNA was used for digestion/PFGE.

protocols.Paper_title: Lytic Myophage Abp53 Encodes Several Proteins Similar to Those Encoded by Host Acinetobacter baumannii and Phage phiKO2
protocols.Evidence: Purified phage DNA was fragmented, cloned, and subjected to nucleotide sequencing.
